heading: Investigation requirement
label: 894d–1 Investigation requirement
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 3548 and is classified to .section 3546 of Pub. L. 114–328section 894e of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce, acting through the Under Secretary for Oceans and Atmosphere, shall ensure that each allegation of sexual harassment reported under and each allegation of sexual assault reported under is investigated thoroughly and promptly.section 894 of this titlesection 894a of this title

children.heading: Sense of Congress on commencement of investigation
children.label: 2 Sense of Congress on commencement of investigation
children.text: It is the sense of Congress that the Secretary should ensure that an investigation of alleged sexual harassment reported under or sexual assault reported under commences not later than 48 hours after the time at which the allegation was reported.section 894 of this titlesection 894a of this title

children.heading: Notification of delay
children.label: b Notification of delay
children.text: In any case in which the time between the reporting of alleged sexual harassment or sexual assault under section 894 or 894a of this title, respectively, and commencement of an investigation of the allegation exceeds 48 hours, the Secretary shall notify the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate and the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives of the delay.
